Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Food and Drugs Act (non-corrective contact lenses)
Identification.ShortTitle: An Act to amend the Food and Drugs Act (non-corrective contact lenses)
Identification.RunningHead: Food and Drugs Act (non-corrective contact lenses)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Food and Drugs Act to deem that a non-corrective contact lens is a device for the purposes of the Act. This enactment will ensure that non-corrective contact lenses are subject to the requirements of the Food and Drugs Act.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: The Food and Drugs Act is amended by adding the following after section 2:
For the purposes of this Act, a non-corrective contact lens is deemed to be a device.
This Act comes into force on a day to be fixed by order of the Governor in Council.
